hero.title: OzaLog
hero.subtitle: Lean. Minimal API. HFT-grade async pipeline. A local file logging library built for .NET applications.

simple.title: Minimal API
simple.desc: One line LOG.Info_Log("...") — no DI, no LoggerFactory.

hft.title: HFT-grade Async
hft.desc: ConcurrentQueue + persistent FileStream pool + 1ms cached timestamp + drop-oldest backpressure.

zerodep.title: Zero Dependencies
zerodep.desc: Zero NuGet dependencies on net8.0 / net9.0 / net10.0.

thread.title: Thread-safe
thread.desc: Thread-safe by default; designed for high-throughput multi-threaded scenarios like crypto tick streams.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: Pick a topic below to get started with OzaLog.
docs.wip: Page content coming soon — see README.md in the GitHub repo.

benchmarks.title: Benchmarks
benchmarks.intro: OzaLog measured head-to-head against ZLogger, ZeroLog, and Serilog with BenchmarkDotNet.
benchmarks.wip: Detailed charts coming soon — see the OzaLog.Benchmarks project in the GitHub repo.

migration.title: v2.x → v3.0 Migration Guide
migration.intro: Complete guide for upgrading from Ozakboy.NLOG v2.x to OzaLog v3.0.
migration.wip: Full guide coming soon — see MIGRATION.md in the GitHub repo.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.intro: See CHANGELOG.md in the GitHub repo for the full history.

sponsor.title: Sponsor
sponsor.intro: If OzaLog helps you, consider sponsoring the developer via cryptocurrency.
